scripts.build:fresh: rm -rf .next out && next build && node scripts/next-static-export-assets.mjs
scripts.public:gate-check: npm run public:route-manifest-check && node scripts/public-demo-gate-check.mjs && node scripts/public-static-link-check.mjs --allow-missing-out && node scripts/public-static-asset-surface-check.mjs --allow-missing-out && npm run public:entry-detail-dossier-check && npm run public:gate-alignment-check
scripts.public:kosmodraw-gate: npm run public:plan-profile-adapter && npm run public:plan-profile-adapter-smoke && npm run public:bundle-negative-smoke && npm run public:bundle-intake-review-check && npm run public:bundle-check && npm run public:kosmodraw-analysis-check && npm run public:copy-canon-check && npm run public:explorer-canon-check && npm run public:atlas-pilot-canon-check && npm run public:gate-check
scripts.quality:check: npm run archive:validate && npm run security:check && npm run ui:audit && npm run i18n:check && npm run atlas:style-guard && npm run atlas:interaction-guard && npm run kosmodata:hud-guard && npm run database:hero-images:audit && npm run database:planet-thumbnails:audit && npm run lint && npm run build:fresh && npm run atlas:static-smoke && npm run kosmo:orbit-static-smoke
scripts.cosmos:tools-smoke: npm run cosmos:plan-generate -- --entry villa-savoye && npm run cosmos:model-generate -- --entry villa-savoye && npm run cosmos:text-generate -- --entry villa-savoye
scripts.brain:cloud-ready: npm run database:source-audit && npm run brain:review && npm run brain:cloud-plan && npm run brain:cloud-export && npm run obsidian:export && npm run brain:api-smoke
